name: Oven Roasted Tempeh & Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Toss tempeh cubes in 3 tablespoons Tamari and 1 tablespoon olive oil.
3. Bake on an oiled cookie sheet for 12 minutes.
4. Remove from oven and reduce heat to 350°F.
5. Whisk together 1 tablespoon oil, 1/4 cup Tamari, flour, Nutritional yeast, and Tahini to form a smooth paste.
6. Whisk in the herbs (Basil, Rosemary, Marjoram). Simmer for 5 minutes.
7. Whisk in enough water to form a thin gravy. Simmer for 10 minutes and remove from heat.
8. In a 3-quart casserole or Dutch oven with lid, combine raw vegetables (except mushrooms and peas) with the gravy.
9. Stir gently and cover. Bake covered for 45 minutes, stirring once or twice during cooking if needed.
10. Add water if necessary to prevent sticking.
11. Add mushrooms and peas and cook, occasionally stirring, for another 15 minutes.
12. Serve.
